The question is asking to compare the heights of two contestants, Rossemely Cruz Logroño and Yisney Lina Lagrange Méndez. Since the "height" column contains numerical data that can be used for comparison, we need to sort the data using the f_sort_column(height) operation with the order "large to small" to determine which contestant is taller.
Rossemely Cruz Logroño has a height of 1.76, while Yisney Lina Lagrange Méndez has a height of 1.82. Therefore, Yisney Lina Lagrange Méndez is taller.
